description_long: This object is a rectangular lamp with a marble-textured exterior and a pair of blue doors on one side, each featuring a small round knob. The marble pattern is predominantly white with gray and black veining, giving it a solid, stone-like appearance. The blue doors are set into a recessed frame, suggesting an access panel or compartment, and are the only visible break in the otherwise continuous marble surface. The top, sides, and back are all covered in the same marble texture, with no visible seams or additional features. The knobs on the blue doors are metallic, likely for opening the compartment. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for urban environments such as public facilities or lobbies.
description: A rectangular marble-textured lamp with blue double doors and metallic knobs, featuring a modern, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing blue double doors with two metallic knobs set in a marble-textured frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a continuous marble-textured surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with an unbroken marble-textured surface, identical to the side view.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also showing a seamless marble-textured surface.
